rationale: El Niño confirmation sustains indirect commodity and energy price risks for Romania; Xi-Kim axis continuation is background noise this cycle; no new regional security shocks.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Visit materialised and is now continuation of established axis deepening; already priced in last cycle, minimal new impact for Romania.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Active El Niño raises risks of weather extremes and commodity price pressures relevant to Romanian agriculture and energy costs.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Ongoing strikes in Lebanon; no escalation beyond baseline, limited direct relevance to Romania.
